channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Napheesa Collier scores 26 to help Lynx top Sun 90-81 and take 2-1 lead in semifinal series
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — After struggling in the last game offensively, Napheesa Collier wasn't going to let it happen again. The Lynx's star scored 26 points and Minnesota beat the Connecticut Sun 90-81 on Friday night to take a 2-1 advantage in the best-of-five semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Christopher cruises past Santa Teresa, asserts itself as BVAL Mt. Hamilton’s top contender
item.description: With its second dominant road win over a San Jose team in two weeks, Gilroy's Christopher High made a statement about who is the top dog — or Cougar — in the BVAL Mt. Hamilton race.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Syracuse rallies to force overtime and beat No. 25 UNLV 44-41, spoiling Rebels' poll debut
item.description: LeQuint Allen powered into the end zone from a yard out in overtime to give Syracuse a 44-41 victory over No. 25 UNLV on Friday night, four days after the Rebels broke into the AP Top 25 for the first time in program history.
item.dc:creator: W.G. Ramirez, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dillon Gabriel, Jordan James lead No. 6 Oregon to 31-10 victory over Michigan State
item.description: Dillon Gabriel threw a pair of touchdown passes and ran for another to help No. 6 Oregon remain undefeated with a 31-10 victory over Michigan State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres hit with 'sudden and drastic' blow to starting rotation on eve of postseason series with Dodgers
item.description: The San Diego Padres are gearing up to try win their first World Series in franchise history - but they will have to do it without Joe Musgrove.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Businessman convicted of cheating ex-NBA star Dwight Howard out of millions in scam to buy WNBA team
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A Georgia businessman was convicted Friday of scamming former NBA star Dwight Howard out of millions of dollars in a bogus scheme to buy the WNBA's Atlanta Dream. The jury returned its verdict against Calvin Darden Jr. on Friday afternoon after a trial in New York City.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How to watch NASCAR and Xfinity races at Talladega
item.description: This weekend, competitors will have to face one of the biggest hurdles in the NASCAR Cup Series Playoffs - Talladega Superspeedway.
item.dc:creator: Jermaine Ferrell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFLPA to announce new program limiting locker room interviews after some players were seen 'naked on camera'
item.description: Several awkward encounters have prompted the NFLPA to propose a new program that will move player interviews outside the locker room, Bengals center and player rep Ted Karras said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alonso's night turns around with season-saving homer for Mets in 9th inning
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Pete Alonso was having a rather disappointing evening in what could have been his final game for the New York Mets. Then everything changed with one swing of the bat.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Ewing returns to the New York Knicks in the new role of basketball ambassador
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Hall of Famer Patrick Ewing is returning to the New York Knicks in the newly created position of basketball ambassador. The Knicks said Friday that Ewing would assist both basketball and business operations in his role. Taken by the Knicks with the No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Leading in a new league: Oceanside golfer wins top spot in nine matches
item.description: “Medalist of the match is basically between the two teams, the individual who has the lowest score,” explained Oceanside High School golfer Kassidy Stevens.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Caitlin Clark officially named WNBA Rookie of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11)— Caitlin Clark was officially named the WNBA Rookie of the Year on Thursday, and rightfully so. Clark averaged 19.2 points, 8.4 assists, and 5.7 rebounds per game. The Indiana Fever finished 20 and 20 on the year and made the playoffs for the first time in eight seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Ticket stub from Michael Jordan's NBA debut, 1998 game-worn jersey autograph card hit auction
item.description: Two rare Michael Jordan items, including a 1984 Bulls box office stub and a 1998 UD Basketball card, are up for auction in New York through October 19, along with other sports memorabilia including a 1914 Babe Ruth Orioles photo and a 1951 Bowman Mantle card.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs remain banged up but carry confidence into Thursday's Falcons clash
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are riding momentum into Thursday night’s NFC South clash with the Atlanta Falcons but so far, the short game week has presented many challenges.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lightning prospects fight for roster spots ahead of Panthers preseason matchup
item.description: Preseason means players fighting for a roster spot get a chance to impress coaches. Center Conor Geekie is one of those players who head coach Jon Cooper thinks highly of.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Zach LaVine still a Chicago Bull (for now), says he's ready to do whatever teams asks of him this season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Zach LaVine insisted he is healthy and ready to do whatever the Chicago Bulls ask of him this season. Above all, he's ready to put the drama in the past.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Team president Jed Hoyer disappointed about 2024, but optimistic about Cubs' direction
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The 2024 MLB playoffs began Tuesday, and the Cubs were once again not among the six teams in the National League playoff field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Lightning and thunder combo could bode well for Bears' offense
item.description: The Chicago Bears have developed a formidable 1-2 punch in running backs D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson, who have shown the ability to both smash and slice through defenses, but the success of the offense depends on the performance of the offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: MLB regular season ends Sunday, playoffs to begin Oct. 1
item.description: The MLB post-season begins Oct. 1 with the Wild Card series. The end of the regular season marks an end to the Athletics' time in Oakland.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Utes offense struggles in 23-10 loss to Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The absence of Cam Rising finally caught up to the Utah football team, as the Utes offense produced just one touchdown and one field goal in a 23-10 loss to Arizona Saturday night at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
